summary: A brief biographical statement by David Silver outlining his current roles as CEO of Ineffable Intelligence and professor at UCL, as well as his past role leading reinforcement learning at DeepMind. He states his overarching mission is to build AI that learns for itself to solve problems humans cannot.

signature_quotes.text: I build AI that learns for itself to solve problems that humans can’t.
signature_quotes.context: Describing his overarching mission and focus in AI research and development.
